alreadyCommonized: Active detail drawer footer variant (stam-btn-danger-outline / ghost-muted / primary — PR #262)
visuallySimilarDifferentContract: Summary strip (동일 레이아웃, RQ inline dot color vs MSL stam-summary-dot)
Table shell/chips (stam-select-table + rq-chip vs msl-chip/stam-link-chip 혼재)
Drawer shell/tabs/forms (RQ rq-dw-* vs MSL msv2 stam-drawer-* + legacy msl-dw-*)
Button aliases (rq-btn / msl-btn 중복 CSS 블록)
riskyImmediateCommonization: MSL dual drawer stack (#msl-dw-* static demo + #msv2-dw runtime) — 제거/통합 설계 선행 필요
Register/Edit form field schema 차이 (요구사항 4섹션 vs 메뉴 3섹션 + FO/BO/LV)
requirements.html 72 inline style 일괄 이관 — 시각 회귀 위험
